narrative:
Hamilton Twp. township has 1,051 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.3 percentage points.
